data.title: Olympio Metals’ Maiden Drilling at Bousquet Uncovers Large Multi-Deposit Gold System
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

CropLogic Ltd. ( (AU:OLY) ) has provided an announcement.

Olympio Metals has reported a highly successful maiden 32-hole diamond drilling program at its Bousquet South area within the Bousquet Gold Project, returning more than 100 significant gold intercepts across three main feeder structures: Paquin/Amadee, Decoeur and CB-1. Results confirm a large, multi-deposit gold system with multiple high-grade intercepts, extensive strike lengths of 1.3km at Paquin-Amadee and 1.7km at Decoeur, and mineralisation demonstrated to depths of up to about 430m, while all key structures remain open along strike and at depth. The company plans to focus follow-up work on these east–west trending corridors to define zones of greatest economic potential, positioning Bousquet as a potentially significant gold asset in a world-class mining camp, where the majority of the project area is still untested.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:OLY) stock is a Sell with a A$0.05 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on CropLogic Ltd. stock, see the AU:OLY Stock Forecast page.

More about CropLogic Ltd.

Olympio Metals Limited (ASX: OLY) is a mineral exploration company focused on gold, with its Bousquet Gold Project located on the prolific Cadillac Break in Quebec, Canada. The project sits within 15km of major multi-million-ounce gold operations, providing the company exposure to a tier-one mining jurisdiction with significant regional upside, as approximately 80% of the project area remains unexplored.

Average Trading Volume: 273,955

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: A$7.53M

Learn more about OLY stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

Funding Circle Holdings ( (GB:FCH) ) has issued an update.

Funding Circle Holdings plc has repurchased 45,262 of its own ordinary shares on the London Stock Exchange as part of the share buy-back programme launched in May 2025, at a volume-weighted average price of 127.1925 pence per share, with the shares acquired from Investec Bank plc. The shares will be held in treasury, taking the company’s treasury holding to 3,069,239 shares and leaving 301,672,337 ordinary shares in issue carrying voting rights, a figure that will be used by investors to calculate notifiable holdings under UK disclosure and transparency rules.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:FCH) stock is a Hold with a £134.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Funding Circle Holdings stock, see the GB:FCH Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on GB:FCH Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, GB:FCH is a Neutral.

Funding Circle Holdings Limited shows a mixed financial performance with positive profitability recovery but challenges in revenue stability and cash flow. The technical indicators suggest a neutral trend, while the valuation is moderate. The earnings call was positive, highlighting growth and customer satisfaction, but macroeconomic challenges remain. The share buyback program is a positive corporate event, indicating confidence in the company’s future.

To see Spark’s full report on GB:FCH stock, click here.

More about Funding Circle Holdings

Funding Circle Holdings plc is a UK-listed financial services company that operates an online lending platform, connecting small and medium-sized enterprises with investors seeking exposure to SME loans. The group focuses on facilitating business financing, primarily through marketplace and technology-driven credit solutions, and is listed on the London Stock Exchange.

data.title: ReconAfrica Raises C$36.8 Million to Accelerate Kavango and Gabon Appraisal Programmes
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An announcement from Reconnaissance Energy Africa ( (TSE:RECO) ) is now available.

Reconnaissance Energy Africa has closed a C$36.8 million underwritten unit offering, issuing 38.7 million units at C$0.95 each, to fund an accelerated 2026 capital program built around its Kavango West 1X discovery in Namibia and the Ngulu Block offshore Gabon. The proceeds will be directed to multi-zone production testing and completion of the Kavango West 1X well, spudding a follow-on appraisal well on the Kavango discovery, reprocessing seismic data and advancing the Loba discovery and wider exploration inventory on the Ngulu Block toward resource reporting and drill-ready status, as well as for general corporate purposes; BW Energy modestly increased its stake through the financing, signaling continued strategic investor support while ReconAfrica positions itself to de-risk and potentially commercialize its African oil and gas portfolio.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:RECO) stock is a Hold with a C$0.88 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Reconnaissance Energy Africa stock, see the TSE:RECO Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TSE:RECO Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:RECO is a Neutral.

The score is primarily held back by weak financial performance—minimal/zero revenue, persistent losses, and negative cash flow—despite the benefit of a debt-free balance sheet. Technicals are supportive due to strong upward trend and positive MACD, but overbought signals raise near-term risk. Valuation is constrained by negative earnings and no stated dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:RECO stock, click here.

More about Reconnaissance Energy Africa

Reconnaissance Energy Africa Ltd. is an oil and gas exploration and development company focused on frontier hydrocarbon plays in Africa, including onshore operations in Namibia’s Kavango Basin and offshore interests in Gabon’s Ngulu Block, where it is advancing both discovery appraisal and broader exploration activity.

Average Trading Volume: 1,006,767

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$293.2M

Find detailed analytics on RECO stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest announcement is out from Rumble Resources, Inc. ( (TSE:RB) ).

Rumble Resources Inc. announced the resignation of Erwin Wong from his roles as Chief Financial Officer, Corporate Secretary and director as he departs to pursue other business interests. The company has moved quickly to maintain continuity by appointing existing board member Christopher Paterson as the new Chief Financial Officer and Secretary, a change that stabilizes leadership as Rumble advances its optioned Wilmac Copper-Gold Project in British Columbia, a key asset underpinning its growth strategy in the regional copper-gold exploration space.

More about Rumble Resources, Inc.

Rumble Resources Inc. is a mineral exploration and development company focused on the identification, acquisition, exploration and development of mineral resource projects. The company holds an exclusive option to acquire a 70% interest in the Wilmac Copper-Gold Project in south-central British Columbia, located southwest of Princeton and near Hudbay Mineral Inc.’s producing Copper Mountain Mine, although it has no interest in or rights to adjacent properties.

data.title: Cambi Secures THP Lease Deal with Thames Water to Boost Oxford Treatment Capacity
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Cambi ASA ( (DE:3W7) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Cambi ASA has signed a small-value lease contract, estimated at the lower end of NOK 15–50 million, to supply a compact thermal hydrolysis process unit to the Oxford sewage treatment works, operated by Thames Water. The one-year lease, with options for two one-year extensions, will increase local sludge treatment capacity by more than 50%, allowing Thames Water to treat all solids on site rather than transporting them elsewhere, and includes annual maintenance plus installation and commissioning supervision ahead of an expected 2026 start-up. The deal deepens Cambi’s three-decade relationship with the UK’s largest water and wastewater utility, reinforces the company’s flexible leasing-based delivery model for meeting urgent capacity needs, and further embeds its THP technology in the UK market, where Thames Water already runs Cambi systems at seven locations.

More about Cambi ASA

Cambi ASA is a global supplier of biogas technology and solutions for wastewater treatment plants and anaerobic digestion facilities, with a core focus on thermal hydrolysis process (THP) systems that boost renewable energy generation, cut operational costs, and reduce greenhouse gas emissions from biosolids treatment. Founded in 1992, the company has maintained market leadership through patented technologies and a strong project delivery track record, delivering installations in 28 countries across six continents and serving a range of biosolids outlets, while being listed on Euronext Growth Oslo.

YTD Price Performance: 9.45%

Average Trading Volume: 38,952

Current Market Cap: NOK2.87B

See more data about 3W7 stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Chalet Hotels Receives Promoter Group Reclassification Requests
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Chalet Hotels Ltd. ( (IN:CHALET) ) has provided an update.

Chalet Hotels Limited has disclosed that it has received requests from Sundew Real Estate Private Limited and Pramaan Properties Private Limited, both currently classified as part of its promoter group but holding no shares in the company, to be reclassified as public shareholders. The company stated that these reclassification requests, made under Regulation 31A of SEBI’s Listing Regulations, will be placed before its Board of Directors at an upcoming meeting, signaling a formal step in refining its shareholding classification and corporate governance disclosures for investors and regulators.

More about Chalet Hotels Ltd.

Chalet Hotels Limited operates in the hospitality and real estate sector, developing and managing hotels and mixed-use properties. The company focuses on upscale and luxury hospitality assets, with its registered office in Mumbai and its securities listed on both the National Stock Exchange of India and BSE, including equity shares, non-convertible debentures, and commercial paper.

Average Trading Volume: 33,013

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

NatWest Group has continued its existing share buyback programme by repurchasing 826,992 ordinary shares on 19 January 2026 from Merrill Lynch International on the London Stock Exchange, at a volume-weighted average price of 643.14 pence per share. data.title: Domestic Metals Taps CRD Expert Peter Megaw to Advance Montana Copper-Gold Project
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Domestic Metals ( (TSE:DMCU) ) has provided an update.

Domestic Metals has appointed renowned Carbon Replacement Deposit specialist Dr. Peter Megaw as a technical advisor to guide exploration at its Smart Creek Copper Porphyry Project in Montana, leveraging his decades of experience and discovery record in silver and gold systems. The move follows recent high-grade surface sampling results at Smart Creek and is accompanied by stepped-up investor outreach through a webinar and conference appearances, underscoring the company’s bid to advance the project and strengthen its position in the North American copper-gold exploration space.

More about Domestic Metals

Domestic Metals Corp. is a Vancouver-based mineral exploration company focused on discovering large-scale copper and gold deposits in historically productive mining districts across the Americas. Its flagship Smart Creek Project in Montana lies in a mining-friendly jurisdiction and hosts widespread surface copper mineralization with multiple porphyry copper, epithermal gold, replacement and exotic copper targets, supported by an experienced management and technical team with a track record in discovery, development and financing.
